creator: fox@FreeBSD.org
text:
Apologies for not going through the existing tickets earlier, I just came across this when I was searching for "headscale" related tickets.

I have committed the patch and updated the package to v0.23.0 in ports tree.

The details are here https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=281940

May I close this ticket?
